creator: bugg@bugg.strangled.net
text:
On Thu, Oct 26, 2000 at 08:32:10AM -0400, James E. Housley wrote:
> These patches do not apply cleanly.  Can you please resubmit a set that
> does.
> 
> Jim
> -- 
> jeh@FreeBSD.org      http://www.FreeBSD.org     The Power to Serve
> jim@TheHousleys.Net  http://www.TheHousleys.net
> ---------------------------------------------------------------------
> Unix is like a wigwam -- no Gates, no Windows, and an Apache inside.

These patches were submitted to me from tkato@prontomail.ne.jp ,
who had originally declined to take credit at all (I offered
him Maintainership, too)

So, I'm forwarding this message to him, with hopes that he can
fix them.

-- 
      Dan Papasian
  (bugg@bugg.strangled.net)

Definition of "Foreign Aid":
The transfer of money from poor people in rich
countries to rich people in poor countries.
